message.thinking:
We need to output JSON array with 3 objects, one per question. The question field should be "Chapters", "Description", or "Structure" depending. Need to check the given text: "Īss katras noslēguma darba nodaļas un pielikumu satura apraksts." This is just a sentence: "Short description of the content of each thesis chapter and appendix." It doesn't list sections, nor describe each, nor give structure. So compliance false for all three. Provide feedback: mention that text doesn't list chapters, no description, no structure. Provide maybe strong parts? There is no strong part. So feedback like: "The text only contains a single generic sentence and does not provide a list of sections, a brief description, or overall structure." Good. Ensure boolean true/false accordingly. Output array of 3 objects. Ensure proper JSON.

Return:

[
  {"question":"Chapters","feedback":"The sentence does not list any chapters or main sections of the thesis, so it fails to meet the requirement.","complies":false},
  {"question":"Description","feedback":"There is no brief description of the contents of each section; the text is only a generic statement.","complies":false},
  {"question":"Structure","feedback":"The text provides no information that would allow readers to understand the general structure of the thesis.","complies":false}
]

Make sure the JSON is valid. No trailing commas. Use double quotes. Good.
